title: Mixed Archive PDF Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in ZIP probe for Story 221. It packages one repo-owned flat born-digital PDF member, one maintained plain-text .eml fixture, one maintained static HTML snapshot, and one intentionally unsupported plain-text member so the first mixed-archive PDF-member slice can prove archive-relative provenance plus a bounded member-local recommendation artifact without silently widening archive-contained PDF automation into unattended final-recipe launch.

members.notes: This member is intentionally limited to the maintained recommendation-only intake seam inside archive routing. The route row should point to the emitted intake plan artifact rather than auto-launching the final recommended PDF recipe.
The ZIP keeps only the HTML member so the bounded probe exercises one blocked unsupported file rather than counting an extra `.source.json` sidecar member.

members.source: repo-authored member embedded only in the ZIP fixture
members.notes: This unsupported text member exists to prove explicit blocked routing on the bounded mixed-archive PDF-member slice.

supported_scope: archive-relative member manifest and route rows
member-local recommendation-only intake for one repo-owned PDF member
suffix-based routing into existing maintained direct-entry recipes for the `.eml` and HTML members
explicit blocked rows for unsupported members
known_gaps: No archive-contained approved handoff or final maintained PDF recipe launch
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-archive normalization into a single combined bundle
